data.title: Beijing Energy Explains Lapses in Disclosing Connected Power Trades
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Beijing Energy International Holding ( (HK:0686) ) has issued an update.

Beijing Energy International issued a supplemental announcement explaining past non-compliance with Hong Kong connected transaction rules, after failing to make timely disclosures on certain electricity trading agreements with connected persons. The company said the omission arose as China’s unified national power market expanded and transactions increasingly took place via standardized power trading platforms, where contracts are formed through electronic confirmations and settlements are handled by grid companies.

An internal review found that the group’s connected-transaction controls were designed mainly for traditional written contracts and direct fund flows, and did not adequately capture indirect connected transactions conducted through third-party trading platforms. The company also cited insufficient familiarity among some frontline subsidiary staff with Chapter 14A of the Listing Rules and substance-over-form requirements, which delayed escalation and disclosure of the relevant electricity transactions.

More about Beijing Energy International Holding

Beijing Energy International Holding Co., Ltd. is a Hong Kong-listed power producer focused on photovoltaic and wind power generation. The company participates in China’s evolving national power market, engaging in interprovincial and intraprovincial power trading via standardized, regulated trading platforms rather than direct bilateral contracts with counterparties.

Average Trading Volume: 740,933

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$2.33B

Learn more about 0686 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Kenmare files 2025 annual report under Ireland’s transparency rules
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Kenmare Resources ( (GB:KMR) ) has provided an update.

Kenmare Resources has published its 2025 Annual Report for the year ended 31 December 2025, complying with the Central Bank of Ireland’s updated transparency guidance. The report, including an ESEF-format version, is now accessible on the company’s website and has been filed with Euronext Dublin’s official mechanism for public inspection.

The disclosure reinforces Kenmare’s regulatory compliance and transparency for investors across its dual listings in London and Dublin. By making the detailed annual report widely available, the titanium minerals producer provides stakeholders with enhanced visibility into its operations at the Moma mine and its position in the global titanium feedstocks market.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:KMR) stock is a Hold with a £220.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kenmare Resources stock, see the GB:KMR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KMR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KMR is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by the 2025 earnings collapse (large net loss), negative free cash flow, and increased leverage, alongside weak technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). The main offset is the very high dividend yield, though the negative P/E reflects the recent loss.

To see Spark’s full report on KMR stock, click here.

More about Kenmare Resources

Kenmare Resources is one of the world’s largest producers of titanium minerals and zircon, listed on the London Stock Exchange and Euronext Dublin. The company operates the Moma Titanium Minerals Mine in northern Mozambique, supplying titanium feedstocks that represent about 6% of global supply to customers in more than 15 countries for use in paints, plastics, and ceramic tiles.

Average Trading Volume: 139,965

data.title: Graphex Group to Terminate U.S. ADS Programme and Refocus on Hong Kong Listing
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Graphex Group ADR ( (GRFXY) ) just unveiled an update.

Graphex Group Limited has moved to voluntarily terminate its sponsored American Depositary Shares programme in the United States, where its ADSs currently trade on the OTC Expert Market under the symbol GRFXY. The decision follows years of declining U.S. listing status, including the May 2025 delisting of its ADSs from NYSE American and their migration to over-the-counter trading.

On April 10, 2026, the company instructed The Bank of New York Mellon to end the deposit agreement, and the depositary notified ADS holders on April 16, 2026 that the programme will terminate on July 14, 2026. Investors have until at least July 17, 2026 to surrender ADSs for the underlying Hong Kong–listed ordinary shares, after which the depositary may sell remaining shares and remit net proceeds, while Graphex will focus its listing and fundraising activities on its primary Hong Kong market.

Spark’s Take on GRFXY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GRFXY is a Neutral.

Graphex Group ADR’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its weak financial performance and poor valuation metrics. The technical analysis further indicates bearish momentum, with the stock trading below key moving averages and nearing oversold conditions. The lack of profitability and absence of a dividend yield make the stock less attractive to investors.

To see Spark’s full report on GRFXY stock, click here.

More about Graphex Group ADR

Graphex Group Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company (HKSE: 6128) whose ordinary shares trade on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The company previously accessed U.S. capital markets through a sponsored American Depositary Share programme, with ADSs representing its Hong Kong–listed ordinary shares and having been traded on venues including NYSE American and, more recently, the OTC Expert Market.

Average Trading Volume: 3,160

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.73M

data.title: Shenzhen Han’s CNC Sets 2025 AGM to Vote on Capital, Payout and Financing Plans
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Shenzhen Han’s CNC Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3200) ) has issued an announcement.

Shenzhen Han’s CNC Technology has convened its 2025 annual general meeting for 8 May 2026 in Shenzhen, where H-shareholders recorded by early May will be eligible to attend or vote by proxy. The agenda covers approval of the 2025 board work report, annual report, final financial accounts, profit distribution plan, a 2026 bank financing plan, re-appointment of auditors and a remuneration system for directors and senior management.

Shareholders will also vote on reports related to the deposit, management and use of proceeds from the company’s 2025 A-share offering, including the use of idle proceeds and self-owned funds for cash management. A special resolution seeks approval to change the company’s registered capital and amend its articles of association, signaling potential adjustments to its capital structure and governance that could influence future financing flexibility and shareholder returns.

More about Shenzhen Han’s CNC Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Shenzhen Han’s CNC Technology Co., Ltd. is a mainland China-based manufacturer in the industrial equipment sector, operating as part of the Han’s Laser group. The company focuses on CNC and intelligent manufacturing solutions, serving industrial clients in China and overseas through its H-share listing in Hong Kong, which provides access to international capital markets.

data.title: Forum Markets Launches Share Buyback and Strategic Review
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Forum Markets ( (FRMM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 17, 2026, Forum Markets announced board-approved measures intended to close the gap between its market capitalization and its view of the firm’s intrinsic value. The company disclosed that on April 15, 2026 its board unanimously reinitiated a share repurchase program, authorizing buybacks at volumes that may exceed typical safe-harbor limits as a direct signal of confidence in the business and its current valuation.

The board also formed a special committee of independent directors to evaluate a wide spectrum of strategic options, including mergers or acquisitions of aligned private companies, a potential sale of the company or key assets, new capital partnerships, or a substantial return of capital to shareholders if no other proposal meets valuation thresholds. In parallel, Forum retained Clear Street Investment Banking as independent financial adviser to provide valuation analysis and help source and assess potential transactions while management continues to pursue revenue and cash-flow growth under the existing business plan.

The most recent analyst rating on (FRMM) stock is a Buy with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Forum Markets stock, see the FRMM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FRMM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FRMM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance (massive net losses and ongoing cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (price below all key moving averages with negative momentum). Corporate events provide some upside optionality through new yield-focused lending initiatives, but valuation support is limited given negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on FRMM stock, click here.

More about Forum Markets

Forum Markets, Incorporated (Nasdaq: FRMM) is a digital asset platform focused on modernizing capital markets through the tokenization of institutional-grade, cash-generating real-world assets. The company brings these assets onto blockchain-based infrastructure to unlock liquidity, expand investor access, and improve efficiency in both primary issuance and secondary trading by integrating traditional asset management with scalable digital market architecture.

Forum structures real-world value so it can be originated, accessed, and traded on-chain, positioning itself at the intersection of asset management and digital markets. Its model targets institutional-quality assets and seeks to use tokenization to broaden participation while maintaining capital markets discipline and regulatory awareness.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $43.27M

data.title: Sunway International Calls 2026 AGM, Seeks Fresh Share Issue Mandate
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Sunway International Holdings Limited ( (HK:0058) ) is now available.

Sunway International Holdings Limited has called its annual general meeting for 5 June 2026 in Hong Kong, with contingency arrangements for severe weather, to present the audited consolidated financial statements and directors’ and auditor’s reports for the year ended 31 December 2025. Shareholders will vote on the re-election of one executive director and one independent non-executive director, authorise the board to set directors’ pay, re-appoint the auditor, and grant the board a general mandate to issue up to 20 per cent of the company’s existing share capital, a move that could provide financing flexibility but also implies potential dilution for existing investors.

The proposed share issuance mandate, which excludes rights issues, share option exercises, scrip dividends and conversions under existing instruments, would run until the next annual meeting or earlier termination, aligning Sunway with common Hong Kong corporate governance practice. These resolutions collectively aim to refresh the company’s governance framework and capital management flexibility for the coming year, signalling a routine but important reset of board authority and capital-raising options that will shape how Sunway can respond to market opportunities and funding needs.

More about Sunway International Holdings Limited

Sunway International Holdings Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 58. While the notice does not detail its business lines, the company operates within the broader Hong Kong-listed corporate sector and is governed by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors.

Average Trading Volume: 329,510

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$159.8M

data.title: Getty Images to Fund Litigation Judgment After Appeal Denial
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Getty Images Holdings ( (GETY) ) is now available.

On October 27, 2023, a U.S. District Court in New York ruled in favor of Alta Partners and CRCM Institutional Master Fund on certain breach of contract claims related to Getty Images Holdings’ public warrants, awarding approximately $36.9 million to Alta and $51.0 million to CRCM plus pre-judgment interest, while ruling in favor of the company on other significant claims, including Alta’s claims on later-acquired warrants. The Second Circuit Court of Appeals affirmed this judgment in all respects on January 15, 2026, and after the appeals court denied Getty Images’ rehearing request on April 16, 2026, the company confirmed it had already recorded a litigation loss and maintained a reserve for the full amount and will partially draw on its existing revolving credit facility, via subsidiary Getty Images, Inc., to help fund payment of the judgment and interest.

The most recent analyst rating on (GETY) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Getty Images Holdings stock, see the GETY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GETY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GETY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak technicals (shares below key moving averages with negative MACD) and unstable profitability despite strong gross margins. Earnings-call takeaways are mixed: strong operating performance and licensing wins are offset by guidance showing lower 2026 EBITDA/revenue versus reported 2025 and by high debt/interest burden and free-cash-flow compression. Corporate events add uncertainty via NYSE compliance risk, partially balanced by progress on merger clearance.

To see Spark’s full report on GETY stock, click here.

More about Getty Images Holdings

Getty Images Holdings operates in the visual content and media licensing industry, providing stock photography, video, music, and related digital assets to businesses, media organizations, and creative professionals worldwide. The company focuses on supplying high-quality visual content for commercial, editorial, and digital marketing uses across global markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,888,252

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $387M

data.title: OraSure, Altai Capital Reach Governance Cooperation Agreement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Orasure Technologies ( (OSUR) ) is now available.

On April 16, 2026, OraSure Technologies announced a cooperation agreement with activist investor Altai Capital, under which Altai withdrew prior director nominations and stockholder proposals and agreed to customary standstill and voting provisions through March 31, 2027. As part of the deal, OraSure appointed healthcare technology executive John D. Bertrand as an independent Class II director, added him to its Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee and committed to include him on its 2026 director slate, while capping board size at eight members before the 2027 annual meeting.

The board also resolved on April 16, 2026 to seek shareholder approval at the 2026 annual meeting to declassify its board structure and phase in annual director elections, a move positioned as strengthening governance, oversight and shareholder engagement. The agreement formalizes a more collaborative relationship with Altai, including regular meetings on financial and strategic matters, signaling a negotiated end to a potential proxy contest and reinforcing OraSure’s broader multi-year transformation and value-creation strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (OSUR) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Orasure Technologies stock, see the OSUR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OSUR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OSUR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weakened financial performance (losses, steep revenue decline, and renewed cash burn). The latest earnings call provides some offset via strong cash/no-debt positioning and credible product/regulatory catalysts, while technicals are neutral and valuation remains challenged due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on OSUR stock, click here.

More about Orasure Technologies

OraSure Technologies, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as OSUR, is a healthcare diagnostics company specializing in point-of-need and home diagnostic tests and sample management solutions. Through subsidiaries including DNA Genotek, Sherlock Biosciences and BioMedomics, it develops, manufactures and distributes rapid diagnostic tests and sample collection and stabilization devices sold globally to clinical, public health, research, government, pharmaceutical and direct-to-consumer markets.

The company focuses on decentralizing diagnostics to connect people to healthcare wherever they are, aiming to improve access, quality and value of care through effortless testing and sample management innovations. Its products target the discovery and detection of critical medical conditions and are used by clinical laboratories, hospitals, physicians’ offices and community organizations worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 493,105

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $224M

Find detailed analytics on OSUR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Canal+ ( (GB:CAN) ) has shared an announcement.

Canal+ has strengthened its top management structure by appointing David Mignot, CEO of Canal+ Africa and CEO of MultiChoice, and Christophe Pinard-Legry, CEO of Europe and France in charge of business, to its Management Board with effect from 16 April 2026, chaired by Maxime Saada. Gérald-Brice Viret, CEO of Canal+ France in charge of programmes and channels, will serve as a permanent invitee, a move that consolidates leadership around key regional and content operations following the integration of MultiChoice and reinforces governance across its European and African markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CAN) stock is a Hold with a £225.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canal+ stock, see the GB:CAN Stock Forecast page.

Offsetting these, cash flow improved materially in 2025 and leverage is better than earlier years, but higher 2025 debt and margin pressure keep the risk profile elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on CAN stock, click here.

More about Canal+

Canal+ is a global media and entertainment company with leading positions in Europe and Africa, operating across the entire audiovisual value chain from production to broadcast, distribution and aggregation. It serves over 40 million subscribers in more than 70 countries, offering pay-TV, streaming, films, live sport and TV series, and owns assets such as MultiChoice Group, STUDIOCANAL, Dailymotion and various telecom operations, alongside minority stakes in Viaplay, Viu and UGC.
